concern_summary: Request to add 'Dr. Kathleen Joy G. Garingarao' as a new referral.
root_cause: New doctor not yet onboarded into referral master data for Nephro at time of request.
actions: Add doctor to the lab's referral ledger.
Verified the doctor appears and is selectable in referral selection lists.

concern_summary: Add and template Thyroid Function CLIA package and related tests as in-house services, with initial price set to 0 PHP since the lab will update pricing in-house.
root_cause: Thyroid Function CLIA package and related tests were not yet configured as in-house services and had no defined package price.
actions: Add CLIA versions of the requested tests under the lab's Immuno/Sero services and update the related document templates.
Update the relevant product templates so these tests use in-house services instead of send-out.
Set the Thyroid Function CLIA package price to 0 PHP initially, following the lab's instruction to update the price in-house later.

concern_summary: Receipt are being printed on whole bond paper
root_cause: The receipts document did not have the correct page setup for receipt printing.
actions: In the affected Document, navigate to Page Setup, set Height and Width to the appropriate size. Ask around for the specific dimensions.
For receipt printing, set the Height to 279.4 mm and width to 80 mm

concern_summary: Add a Standard X-Ray Format Result [Can Copy in OG Test-Lab]
root_cause: Go to documents, Patient Service, (Not Patient Services ah), and search for X-ray, and create a duplicate template based on the client's request.
actions: Navigate to Documents, go to Patient Service, (Not Patient Services ah), and search for X-ray, and created a duplicate template based on the client's request.

concern_summary: In result form Hematology, would it be possible that results and references be standardized to two decimal places with trailing zeros retained. For example 0.60 instaed of 0.6
root_cause: null
actions: In the affected Document, simply edit the results and edit the code to have desired decimal places.

concern_summary: Delete patient record.
root_cause: null
actions: Go to Patients -> Search for patient -> Delete patient record

concern_summary: Add Service Fields & Category. Fungal Elements with Service Fields of Budding Yeasts, Pseudohyphae.
actions: Navigate to Services, select a Service, Add a the requested Category and Service fields
Input the appropriate units and reference ranges for the new service fields.

concern_summary: Client requested to add two new packages (SNR CENTRAL SCHOOL OPTION 1 and OPTION 2) with specified prices and test inclusions.
root_cause: Requested corporate packages were not yet configured in the products master data for Sky Diagnostic.
actions: Navigated to Products -> Add Product in the LIS configuration.
Created product 'SNR CENTRAL SCHOOL OPTION 1' with price set to FREE and inclusions: Consultation, Chest X-ray, CBC, Fecalysis, Urinalysis, FBS, Lipid Profile.
Created product 'SNR CENTRAL SCHOOL OPTION 2' with price set to 1,200 and inclusions: BUN, Creatinine, BUA, SGPT, SGOT, Alkaline Phosphatase, Sodium, Potassium, 12-L ECG.
Verified both packages are selectable and correctly priced with complete inclusions under Sky Diagnostic.

concern_summary: Client requested the creation of a new category named 'Hepa Profile' under the Clinical Chemistry module.
actions: Navigate to Services, and select the Service. For example: Clinical Chemistry, Hematology, etc.
Add the new requested Category under the selected service field settings.
Configure the appropriate units and reference ranges for parameters included in the Hepa Profile category.

concern_summary: X-ray image not showing in generated document despite using the FILE UPLOAD template placeholder.
root_cause: The X-ray file upload template was referencing the wrong docsgen source; the patient service used xrayImage.files while the file upload docsgen was still pointing to remarks.files, resulting in blank output.
actions: Check docsgen configuration for the X-ray service and identify that the patient service pulls images from xrayImage.files.
Reviewed the file upload docsgen configuration and found it was still pointing to remarks.files instead of xrayImage.files.
Updated the file upload docsgen configuration to reference xrayImage.files as the source for {{ FILE UPLOAD }}.
Regenerated the X-ray document for patientXRAY6060210 and additional patients to confirm the image now displays correctly.

concern_summary: User is unable to cancel a patient order
root_cause: store-level setting that allows cancellation of orders was disabled, preventing the patient service from being deleted or canceled
actions: Navigated to the Stores page and opened the configuration for the affected store.
Located the setting that controls whether orders can be canceled and found it was disabled.
Enabled the setting to allow order cancellations.

concern_summary: Signature is overlapping and blocking the text on the document.
root_cause: Signatory layout configuration caused the signature to overlap with body text.
actions: Navigate to the affected document's configuration under Documents or Signatories.
Adjust the signatory layout so signatures do not overlap with the document text.

concern_summary: Result prompt alignment on the document is incorrect.
root_cause: Document alignment configuration for result prompts was not set as requested.
actions: Navigate to Documents and open the affected template.
Edit the alignment of the requested result values.

concern_summary: Requested to add 'RF Microneedling' as a variant under Session Notes.
root_cause: The 'RF Microneedling' option was not yet configured as a variant in the Session Notes service.
actions: Navigate to Services and open Session Notes.
Use the Variant button and add 'RF Microneedling' as a variant.

concern_summary: Ultrasound document is generating too many extra blank/white pages.
root_cause: Ultrasound document template formatting caused excessive whitespace and extra page breaks.
actions: Navigate to Documents and open the affected ultrasound template.
Adjust the document layout/formatting to remove unnecessary whitespace and extra page breaks.

concern_summary: Some patient services statuses sometimes do not update as expected.
root_cause: Handled and fixed by the development team; specific root cause not documented in this ticket.
actions: Escalate similar intermittent status issues on patient services to the development team with affected examples.

concern_summary: Release date field in the document is missing.
root_cause: The release date is only populated when the patient service status is marked as completed; when the status is collected, no release date is shown.
actions: For missing release date issues, check the patient service status on the affected case.
If the document should show a release date, ensure the patient service is marked as completed rather than collected.

concern_summary: Requested to add a new signatory.
root_cause: The required signatory was not yet configured under Signatories.
actions: Navigate to Signatories.
Add the requested signatory.

concern_summary: Release date field in the document is missing.
root_cause: The docsgen configuration for Patient Info did not correctly include or reference the release date field.
actions: Modify the docsgen configuration for the Patient Info section to include the correct release date field.

concern_summary: Encoded information is not appearing in the queueing view.
root_cause: Results were being entered on the collection step instead of through queue tasks, so they did not appear as expected in the queue.
actions: Advise users to input results in the queue tasks instead of on the collection step for cases where data must appear in queueing.

concern_summary: No tests are listed under the patient service package in the document; client does not see the package tests.
root_cause: The document logic did not iterate over the tests in the patient service package, so package items were not rendered.
actions: Update the document template logic to loop through the package's tests (e.g., using a for-loop) and render each test under the patient service package.

concern_summary: Requested to add a new cashier.
root_cause: The required cashier account was not yet configured under Partners and Cashiers.
actions: Navigate to Partners.
Create a new Partner and configure the corresponding Cashier entry.

concern_summary: Client requested to add two new packages (SNR CENTRAL SCHOOL OPTION 1 and OPTION 2) with specified prices and test inclusions.
root_cause: Requested corporate packages were not yet configured in the products master data for Sky Diagnostic.
actions: Confirm the exact package names, prices, and test inclusions from the client request.
Navigate to Products and use Add Product to create each missing package for the lab.
For each new package, set the correct price (e.g., FREE or 1,200) and include all requested tests in the package inclusions.

concern_summary: Add Service Fields & Category. Fungal Elements with Service Fields of Budding Yeasts, Pseudohyphae.
root_cause: The 'Fungal Elements' category and its related service fields (Budding Yeasts, Pseudohyphae) were not yet configured in Microbiology services.
actions: Navigate to Services and open the Microbiology configuration.
Add a new category named 'Fungal Elements'.
Under this category, add service fields for 'Budding Yeasts' and 'Pseudohyphae'.

concern_summary: Delete patient record.
root_cause: Patient record needed to be removed from the patient registry (e.g., wrong entry or duplicate).
actions: Navigate to Patients and search for the specific patient record.
Use the delete option on the matched patient record to remove it from the system, following any required confirmation steps.

concern_summary: Standardize how results and reference values are displayed to a specific number of decimal places with trailing zeros (for example, 0.60 instead of 0.6).
root_cause: The document template formatting did not enforce a consistent number of decimal places for results and reference ranges.
actions: Navigate to Documents and open the affected result form template.
Update the formatting logic for numeric result and reference fields to always display the required number of decimal places (including trailing zeros).

concern_summary: add charge Ledger group - BHI - MOBILE / POLYFOAM RGC INTERNATIONAL
root_cause: The required charge ledger for BHI - MOBILE / POLYFOAM RGC INTERNATIONAL was not yet configured under the appropriate ledger group.
actions: Navigate to Ledger Groups and open the relevant ledger group.
Within the selected ledger group, choose the target ledger and add the missing ledger entry for BHI - MOBILE / POLYFOAM RGC INTERNATIONAL.

concern_summary:
Add watermark
DOH watermark not appearing
root_cause: The document template was not correctly linked to the DOH watermark via the Document Files configuration.
actions: Navigate to Documents and open the affected document template.
Open the Document Files mini icon/panel and identify the DOH watermark file ID.
Use the DOH watermark file ID in the template (for example with a {{ paste }} placeholder) so the watermark appears on the document.

concern_summary: Remove availed service
root_cause: Availed services are tied to patient plans that currently cannot be removed, only toggled active or inactive.
actions: From Patients, open the specific patient record and go to the Plans section.
Set the relevant plan to active or inactive as needed; full plan removal is not supported as of June 2026.
For cases requiring actual removal or behavior change, check for product updates or raise the limitation to Help or a supervisor.

concern_summary: TG results not transmitting from machine, evident in 2 px services
root_cause: Handled by Dev-Rim; specific root cause not yet documented in this ticket.
actions: Confirm affected patient services where TG results are missing from the LIS despite being run on the machine.
Raise the issue to the Dev-Rim team with example patient services and timestamps so they can investigate the machine-to-LIS transmission.

concern_summary:
Very specific request, they wanted the signatory for Aldrin Mayon to be on the left side specifically and the others on the right side
Signatory not aligned
root_cause: Signatory layout for Dr. Aldrin Mayon was not configured to place his signatory on the left while keeping the others on the right.
actions: Navigate to Documents and open the Signatories configuration.
Edit the signatory settings for Dr. Aldrin Mayon to adjust his alignment/position as requested (left side, with the other signatories on the right side).
